# GLFW - Graphics Library Framework

This is a placeholder for the GLFW library.

## Installation

GLFW should be initialized as a git submodule:

```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive
```

Or clone manually:

```bash
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git extern/GLFW
```

## Build Instructions

CMake will automatically detect and build GLFW from the extern/GLFW directory.
